column1: # WYSIWYG `:Format Color` — Background and Text color, plus Reset.
# Three menu levels: :Format Color → Background|Text|Reset → palette.
# Palette letters (each picker is the same 8 colors):
#   B Black  W White  R Red  G Green  L bLue  Y Yellow  C Cyan  M Magenta
# Layout: A1 "hi" so we have something to color.  The pointer is
# parked off A1 before each ASSERT_CELL_BG / ASSERT_CELL_FG so the
# REVERSED highlight does not mask the cell's stored colors.
# `:Format Color Background Red` over A1 — paints background red.
# `:Format Color Text Yellow` over A1 — paints text yellow.
# Background still red — text and bg colors are independent.
# `:Format Color Reset` over A1 — strips both background and text.
